title: HUNT-851 The girls in the class who have run away from home see the AV and "estrus without permission !!" The girls in the class who use my castle (a distance in the garden) as an evacuation site when they leave home without permission! !!
overview: My slightly rich room is separate from my parents. A girl in a class who recently heard such a rumor comes and stays for a few days every time she runs away from home. To be honest, I'm dissatisfied because I can't watch AV as a hobby, but a girl who came to stay secretly while I was sleeping at midnight sees AV and estrus without permission and asks for my Ji Po. !!
